headline: Hasbro’s Magic Has Unlocked A 41% Stock Upside — But The Market Still Doesn’t Get It
summary: BNP Paribas sees 41% upside in Hasbro stock, arguing investors are underestimating the growth and profitability of Magic: The Gathering.
